name: victory
description: Threshold-driven 9-phase build: reset, bottom-up build to PWM 0xa5, dramatic flurry with random LED drops, ramp-up via 200/198, hold, cut. Mirrors firmware case 0x0c.

tracks._comment: Phase 0 — reset all LEDs at tick 0.
Phase 1 — base layers 4 and 5 light at tick 3.
Phase 2 — ledge layer 3 lights at tick 133.
Phase 6 sparkle: every 4th tick in [649, 713) drop one random LED to PWM 128. Registered BEFORE scaleAll so within-tick order matches victory.ts:75-80 (drop first, then decay).
Phases 6 & 7 — every tick from 649 through 844 inclusive run decayAll(200, 198) ≈ ×1.01 (ramp-up).
Phase 8 — cut to black at tick 845.
